title: spiranthes latifolia
intro: Spiranthes latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved ladies' tresses, is a type of orchid native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of S. latifolia include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots are often used in herbal remedies.
